title: Why I stopped guessing my trades (and how AI validated this trade at 2.63 R/R on XAUUSD)
author: Disastrous_Hotel_574
selftext:
Hi, as a developer, I was tired of manually updating my Google Sheets and exiting my trades based on gut feeling.

I built Hercul Market (Next.js/Supabase) to automate structure analysis. Results on gold this morning:

Setup: Liquidity sweep identified by AI in a demand zone.

Execution: Surgical entry, AI maintained bias despite noise in 15m.

Result: TP hit at 5192.91 (Ratio 2.63) and +$643 profit. 

Game changer:

Zero emotion: The algorithm doesn't panic over a red candle.

Auto sync: No more formula errors in Excel, everything is synchronized in PostgreSQL.

Focus XIRR: Automated real performance calculation.

If you're still running on slow .xlsx files, try the analyzer here: [hercul-market-web.vercel.app](http://hercul-market-web.vercel.app)

Any thoughts on SMC automation? 📈

comments.author: ZealousidealAge1337
comments.body: Can I dm? I'm building an EA based on SMC aswell
